title: Queue Job Status
description: Current status of a job in Redis — used for polling via get_job_status tool

status.description: pending=in queue, running=being processed, done/failed/timeout=terminal states

worker_id.description: Set when a worker picks up the job

result.description: Present when status is done, failed, or timeout

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when job was created

started_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when worker started processing

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when job reached terminal state
